extensionDescription.message: Gérer et insérer des modèles d'e-mails avec pièces jointes

composeActionTitle.description: Tooltip for the compose action button

menuInsertTemplate.description: Context menu root item in compose body

menuSaveAsTemplate.description: Context menu item on a message in the message list

popupNoTemplates.message: Aucun modèle pour l'instant. Cliquez ci-dessous pour en créer un.

optionsAddTemplate.description: Button to add a new template

optionsNoTemplates.message: Aucun modèle pour l'instant. Cliquez sur « Nouveau modèle » pour commencer.

optionsNewTemplate.description: Editor dialog title for new template

optionsBack.description: Back button to return to template list

optionsSaveError.message: Impossible d'enregistrer le modèle. Le stockage est peut-être plein — essayez de réduire la taille des pièces jointes ou de supprimer d'anciens modèles.

optionsLabelAttachments.description: Label for attachments section in editor

searchPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text for the search input

optionsDuplicateName.description: Default name for a duplicated template

optionsLabelInsertMode.description: Label for the insertion mode dropdown

optionsInsertModeAppend.description: Option to append template body to existing email body

optionsInsertModePrepend.description: Option to insert template body at the beginning of existing email body

optionsInsertModeReplace.description: Option to replace existing email body with template body

optionsInsertModeCursor.message: Insérer à la position du curseur
optionsInsertModeCursor.description: Option to insert template body at the current cursor position, preserving signature and existing text

optionsCategoryAll.description: Option to show all categories in filter

popupCategoryAll.description: Option to show all categories in popup filter

optionsRecipientHelp.message: Séparez plusieurs destinataires par des virgules. Exemple : john@example.com, Jean Dupont <jean@example.com>

optionsUsageCount.description: Usage count shown on template card

optionsUsageNever.description: Shown on template card when template has never been inserted

optionsExportJson.description: Button to export all templates as a JSON file

optionsImportJson.description: Button to import templates from a JSON file

optionsImportError.message: Fichier invalide. Veuillez sélectionner un fichier JSON TemplateWing valide.
optionsImportError.description: Error message when an invalid file is imported

optionsAccountsHelp.message: Laissez vide pour afficher ce modèle pour tous les comptes. Sélectionnez des comptes spécifiques pour limiter l'affichage de ce modèle.

optionsAllAccounts.description: Option to show template for all accounts

optionsLabelNestedTemplates.description: Label for nested template help section

optionsNestedTemplatesHelp.message: Inclure un autre modèle avec {{template:Nom du modèle}} ou {{templateid:abc123}}. Les références circulaires sont détectées et évitées.
optionsNestedTemplatesHelp.description: Help text for nested template syntax

importDialogTitle.description: Title of the import confirmation dialog

importModeLabel.description: Legend for the import mode radio buttons

importDialogTotal.description: Total templates found in the import file

importDialogInvalid.description: Number of invalid entries in the import file

importDialogDuplicates.description: Number of templates with names that already exist

importModeAppend.description: Import mode: add all valid templates as new entries

importModeAppendDesc.message: Importer tous les modèles valides, même si un modèle avec le même nom existe déjà.

importModeSkip.description: Import mode: skip templates whose names already exist

importModeSkipDesc.message: N'importer que les modèles dont le nom n'existe pas encore.

importModeReplace.message: Mettre à jour les existants par nom
importModeReplace.description: Import mode: replace existing templates with same name

importModeReplaceDesc.message: Écraser les modèles existants portant le même nom ; ajouter les nouveaux.

validationNameRequired.message: Le nom du modèle est requis.
validationNameRequired.description: Error when template name is empty

validationInvalidRecipients.description: Error when recipient email format is invalid

attachmentSizeWarning.description: Short warning shown next to a large attachment

attachmentTotalWarning.message: La taille totale des pièces jointes ($SIZE$) est importante. Cela peut augmenter considérablement l'utilisation du stockage.
attachmentTotalWarning.description: Warning when total attachment size exceeds threshold

attachmentReadError.description: Error when a file cannot be read during attachment

optionsPastePlainText.description: Label for the paste sanitization toggle in the editor toolbar

validationDuplicateName.message: Un modèle avec ce nom existe déjà.
validationDuplicateName.description: Error when trying to save a template with a duplicate name

notificationInsertFailedTitle.description: Title for the notification shown when template insertion fails

notificationAttachmentFailed.description: Notification body when one or more attachments failed to attach

notificationInsertFailedGeneric.message: Le modèle n'a pas pu être inséré. Consultez la console d'erreurs pour plus de détails.
notificationInsertFailedGeneric.description: Notification body for a generic template insertion failure

validationBodyEmptyReplace.message: Avertissement : le corps est vide. Le mode remplacement supprimera le contenu du message d'origine.
validationBodyEmptyReplace.description: Warning shown when body is empty/whitespace in replace insert mode

popupSearchPlaceholder.description: Placeholder for the popup search box

popupNoMatch.message: No templates match the current filter.
popupNoMatch.description: Shown when search/category filter hides every template

popupPinTemplate.description: Tooltip for the pin (favorite) icon when a template is not pinned

popupUnpinTemplate.description: Tooltip for the pin icon when a template is already pinned

optionsDefaultsTitle.description: Heading of the defaults section on the options page

optionsDefaultsHelp.message: Auto-insert the selected template when you open a new compose window with the matching account. Replies and forwards are skipped.
optionsDefaultsHelp.description: Help text for the defaults section

optionsDefaultsNoIdentities.description: Shown in defaults section when no identities exist

optionsVariableReplyQuote.message: {REPLY_QUOTE} — Quoted body of the message being replied to

optionsVariableLastSubject.message: {LAST_MESSAGE_SUBJECT} — Subject of the message being replied to (Re:/Fwd: stripped)

optionsVariablePrompt.message: {PROMPT:Label:default} — Ask the user for a value at insert time

optionsVariableChoice.message: {CHOICE:Label:opt1|opt2|opt3} — Ask the user to pick one option

promptDialogTitle.description: Title of the dialog that collects PROMPT/CHOICE answers

promptDialogSubmit.description: Submit button in the prompt dialog

promptDialogCancel.description: Cancel button in the prompt dialog

lintSummaryClean.message: All templates pass the linter — no issues found.
lintSummaryClean.description: Shown above the template list when no template has lint issues

lintSummaryDirty.description: Shown above the template list when at least one template has lint issues

lintBadgeErrors.description: ARIA label for the red lint badge

lintBadgeWarnings.description: ARIA label for the yellow lint badge

usageFilterLabel.description: Label preceding the unused-since filter dropdown

usageFilterNever.description: Filter option: never used templates only

usageExportCsv.description: Button to export usage data as CSV

usageColName.description: Usage table column header: template name

usageColIdentities.description: Usage table column header: identity restriction count

usageColCount.description: Usage table column header: usage count

usageColLastUsed.description: Usage table column header: last used date

usageColAvgPerWeek.description: Usage table column header: average inserts per week

usageChartLabel.description: Accessible label for the top-10 bar chart

usageEmpty.message: No templates match the current filter.
usageEmpty.description: Shown when the usage filter excludes every template

importColName.description: Import preview column: incoming template name

importColStatus.description: Import preview column: NEW / DUPLICATE / INVALID

importStatusNew.description: Status badge: incoming template name does not exist

importStatusDuplicate.description: Status badge: a template with this name already exists

importActionSkip.description: Per-row action: do nothing for this row

importActionAdd.description: Per-row action for NEW rows: add to library

importActionAddCopy.description: Per-row action for DUPLICATE rows: import with a suffixed name

importActionReplace.description: Per-row action for DUPLICATE rows: overwrite the existing template

importActionRename.description: Per-row action: import under a user-supplied new name

importRenamePlaceholder.description: Placeholder in the per-row rename input

importBulkLabel.description: Label preceding the bulk-action buttons in the import preview

importBulkSkip.description: Bulk-action button: set every applicable row to skip

importBulkAppend.description: Bulk-action button: set every applicable row to add-copy/append

importBulkReplace.description: Bulk-action button: set every applicable row to replace
